warrior.name: Sword Strike
warrior.description: Deal physical damage with your weapon.

rogue.name: Dagger Slash
rogue.description: A swift strike from the shadows.

mage.name: Magic Bolt
mage.description: Hurl a bolt of arcane energy.

priest.name: Holy Smite
priest.description: Channel divine wrath against your foe.

ranger.name: Arrow Shot
ranger.description: Loose a precise arrow at the target.

activeAbilities.name: Shield Bash
activeAbilities.description: Bash with your shield, stunning the foe.
activeAbilities.triggerText: When HP falls below 50%, replaces the next main attack.

activeAbilities.name: Execute
activeAbilities.triggerText: When the target has less than 20% HP, replaces the main attack.

activeAbilities.name: Rallying Cry
activeAbilities.description: Shout to steel your nerves at the start of battle.
activeAbilities.triggerText: Automatically at the beginning of combat.

activeAbilities.name: Blade Dance
activeAbilities.triggerText: Every 3 turns, attack twice instead of using Sword Strike.

activeAbilities.name: Second Wind
activeAbilities.description: Recover a portion of your vitality when near death.
activeAbilities.triggerText: Once per battle when HP falls below 30%.

activeAbilities.name: Backstab
activeAbilities.description: Strike from the shadows for massive damage.

activeAbilities.name: Shadow Step
activeAbilities.description: Slip through shadows to avoid harm.
activeAbilities.triggerText: 25% chance to dodge each incoming attack.

activeAbilities.name: Arcane Bolt
activeAbilities.description: A concentrated burst of arcane power.

activeAbilities.name: Arcane Surge
activeAbilities.description: Surging arcane power amplifies your magic.
activeAbilities.triggerText: Every 3rd main attack deals +50% magical damage.

activeAbilities.name: Divine Light
activeAbilities.description: Smite with holy radiance and mend wounds.
activeAbilities.triggerText: When HP falls below 40%, heal and smite.

activeAbilities.name: Divine Protection
activeAbilities.description: Holy wards soften blows from dark foes.
activeAbilities.triggerText: Take 25% less damage from undead and cursed enemies.

activeAbilities.name: Hunter's Volley
activeAbilities.description: Loose two arrows in quick succession.
activeAbilities.triggerText: Every 2 turns, fire twice instead of Arrow Shot.

activeAbilities.name: Keen Sight
activeAbilities.description: Spot weak points on wounded prey.
activeAbilities.triggerText: +15% Critical Chance against enemies below half HP.

activeAbilities.name: Deathless Rage
activeAbilities.description: Refuse to fall while rage burns.
activeAbilities.triggerText: Once per combat, survive a lethal hit with 1 HP.
